channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Intersection of Management and AI: Navigating the Future of Work
item.description: The integration of artificial intelligence in management is revolutionizing work, but also presents new challenges. Learn how to navigate this shift and adapt to a future where technology meets human interaction.
item.dc:creator: Tara Chklovski, Fast Company

item.title: Troubleshooting a Crashing Windows PC: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Learn how to troubleshoot and fix a crashing Windows PC with these nine essential tips. From safe mode to system restore, we've got you covered.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok ban: 5 essential reads on the case and its concerns
item.description: A three-judge panel of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit on December 6, 2024, upheld a law requiring TikTok’s China-based parent company, ByteDance, to sell the video app by January 19, 2025, or face a nationwide ban on the app.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clarifai previews AI compute orchestration
item.description: AI platform provider Clarifai is publicly previewing compute orchestration for AI workloads that the company says works across any AI model on any compute, at any scale.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk signals he won't use growing influence to go after competitors
item.description: Elon Musk indicated Friday that he will not use his growing influence in the Trump administration to hurt or seek revenge on his industry competitors.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ally Financial finds gen AI success with 3 guiding principles
item.description: Bank holding company Ally Financial is determined to stay at the cutting edge of technology in the financial industry. Today, that means leveraging gen AI to transform its business.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As data centers proliferate, conflict with local communities follows
item.description: Some residents are pushing back against the world’s most powerful corporations over concerns about the economic, social and environmental health of their communities.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 8 phishing email scams to watch out for this holiday season
item.description: Be on alert this holiday season for phishing emails. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson shares several examples of fake phishing emails he's received in his inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX
item.description: Explore what’s next for HISP agencies as they transform customer, employee and total experience The post High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: If you had a Patreon account, you may qualify for this payment
item.description: Patreon will pay $7.25 million across users who had accounts and accessed videos on Patreon.com between April 1, 2016 and Sept. 23, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Katie Millard, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fortinet launches integrated cloud app security service
item.description: Fortinet has melded some of its previously available services into an integrated cloud package aimed at helping customers secure applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Max to begin cracking down on password sharing next week
item.description: Max will begin its password-sharing crackdown next week, beginning with "very early, gentle messaging" directed at high-usage users.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Spotify Wrapped: How to view, share your personalized recap
item.description: Want to show everyone who your top five artists were or just how much time you spent listening to music and podcasts? Now is your chance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Cython tutorial: How to speed up Python
item.description: Python is a powerful programming language that is easy to learn and easy to work with, but it is not always the fastest to run—especially when you’re dealing with math or statistics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI weapons detection system used in Tennessee schools sued by FTC
item.description: The technology scans students and other visitors for weapons, using AI, without requiring them to remove items from their person, according to previous marketing.
item.dc:creator: Tori Gessner, NewsNation

item.title: Army Guard to prioritize application visibility across states and territories in 2025
item.description: Fiscal 2025 is shaping up to be busy for the Army National Guard as it pushes to complete migration of all end-user devices to Entra ID and Intune. The post Army Guard to prioritize application visibility across states and territories in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: What to make of Pat Gelsinger’s abrupt exit
item.description: The retirement of Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has left more questions than Intel answered in its statement regarding his departure. Intel in the past had a measured process of ascension for future CEOs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4
